message:
test(core): property-based tests for stream_hash homomorphic rolling hash (wa-00u4)

21 proptest properties verifying:
- Homomorphic combine: H(A||B) == combine(H(A), H(B))
- Associativity: combine(combine(A,B),C) == combine(A,combine(B,C))
- Incremental consistency: chunked/byte-at-a-time matches one-shot
- Identity element: combine with empty hash
- Reset returns to initial state
- Collision resistance: distinct inputs → distinct digests
- Digest serialization roundtrip + hex format
- IntegrityChecker match/divergence/offset detection
- Digest.matches() reflexivity and symmetry

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
